verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have looked at the picture for so long But that painted fire Could not keep me warm Until the Holy Spirit came Ang gave new sight Then what so long Had been a picture So newly came alive

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Behold the Masterpiece, Unveiled in the end; Almighty God Himself Dwelling in flesh again She's marching up, in step, in line; Behold the Word, Behold the Bride.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hewn of earth And before the Master laid To become the vision He had foreordained And as time chipped off the part He did not need She became so much like Him He cried, "Speak!"
